meaning: vi.移动,移往,移植,随季节而移居,(鸟类的)迁徙vt.使移居,使移植
examples: What caused the monsoon to migrate?
What about birds that migrate at night?
On warm days, Bostonians migrate to this popular park to sunbathe, picnic and feed waterfowl.
Sony did not reveal if any members of that team will migrate to other Sony studios.
